steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: On the left: “poetic” is an adjective modifying the noun that follows. On the right: noun phrases serving as list items.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: A colon introduces a list or elaboration; choice B is correct. The colon after “style” introduces what follows, while the comma between the two coordinate adjectives “terse” and “compressed” correctly joins them. The other three choices fail: A creates an erroneous sentence boundary with a period, C uses a comma which cannot introduce a list, and D uses a semicolon before an adjective. That matches choice B — B is correct.
